origin.points.name: WATER IN GLASS
origin.points.phrase: I carried water, then I became transparent.

origin.points.name: LATIN AT THE THRESHOLD
origin.points.phrase: The law begins here, before language.

origin.points.name: THE COMMERCIAL PASSAGE
origin.points.phrase: I was not a street, but I had a flow.

origin.points.name: THE STONE ALPHABET
origin.points.phrase: I speak without a voice. I mark without writing.

origin.points.name: THE INVISIBLE THRESHOLD
origin.points.phrase: You enter without knowing it. You leave without seeing it.
